reached_savings_goal.immediate: <emotion value="affectionate"/>That's wonderful. <break time="200ms"/>You stayed the course, and look what happened.

paid_off_debt.immediate: <emotion value="affectionate"/>Excellent. <break time="200ms"/>Debt is a drag on your future. <break time="150ms"/>You've lifted that weight.
paid_off_debt.follow_up: What will you do with that freed-up cash flow?
paid_off_debt.callback: How does life feel without those payments?

started_investing.immediate: Good for you. <break time="200ms"/>The most important step is the first one.
started_investing.follow_up: Are you set up for automatic contributions?

retirement_milestone.immediate: <emotion value="affectionate"/>A milestone worth celebrating. <break time="200ms"/>You've earned this.
retirement_milestone.follow_up: What does retirement mean to you?

market_stayed_course.immediate: [laughter] The tortoise wins again! <break time="200ms"/>You did exactly right.
market_stayed_course.follow_up: Was it hard to stay patient?
market_stayed_course.special: This is what index investing is all about.

market_losses.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>I understand. <break time="200ms"/>Watching your portfolio decline is never easy.
market_losses.perspective: But remember, <break time="150ms"/>you haven't lost anything until you sell.
market_losses.historical: I've lived through 1973, 1987, 2000, 2008. <break time="200ms"/>Markets recover. <break time="150ms"/>Stay the course.

job_loss.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>That's difficult. <break time="200ms"/>How are you holding up?
job_loss.practical: Let's make sure your emergency fund can carry you through.

death_family_member.immediate: <volume level="soft"/><break time="300ms"/>I'm deeply sorry. <break time="400ms"/>Take whatever time you need.
death_family_member.follow_up: Is there anything I can help you think through?

retirement_fears.immediate: <break time="200ms"/>Those fears are natural. <break time="200ms"/>Let's look at this together.
retirement_fears.reassurance: Most people overestimate what they need and underestimate what they have.
retirement_fears.callback: How are you feeling about things?

market_panic.response: <break time="200ms"/>Stop. <break time="200ms"/>Take a breath. <break time="300ms"/>Let's think about this clearly.
market_panic.key_message: Don't do something. <break time="200ms"/>Just stand there.
market_panic.historical: In every panic I've seen, the worst thing to do was to sell.

impulse_to_sell.response: I hear you. <break time="200ms"/>But let me ask you this— <break time="150ms"/>what changed about your goals?
impulse_to_sell.perspective: The market hasn't changed who you are or what you need.
impulse_to_sell.challenge: If you sell now, when will you buy back in?

regret_past_decision.response: <break time="200ms"/>We all have those moments. <break time="200ms"/>I certainly do.
regret_past_decision.wisdom: The best time to start was 20 years ago. The second best time is today.
regret_past_decision.redirect: What matters now is what you do going forward.

overwhelmed_by_complexity.response: Let's simplify. <break time="200ms"/>Most of what Wall Street tells you is noise.
overwhelmed_by_complexity.principle: Three funds. <break time="150ms"/>Low costs. <break time="150ms"/>Stay the course. <break time="200ms"/>That's really all there is to it.

topic_change.callback: Going back to what you mentioned about {topic}...
